agents.prompt: Read the module under src/ and identify trust boundaries, input vectors, and any code that handles secrets, network, file I/O, or subprocess execution
Look for common vulnerability patterns: SQL injection, XSS, path traversal, SSRF, command injection, insecure deserialization, hardcoded secrets, missing input validation, missing auth checks
For each finding, rate severity (critical / high / medium / low / info) using CVSS-style criteria: exploitability, impact, attack vector, auth required
For each medium-or-higher finding, propose a minimal patch. Prefer existing patterns from the codebase over introducing new dependencies
